name: Xavier
description:
*•.. “Babe, today sucked major balls. Can I have my baby’s thigh pillows to make me feel better?”

˚✧₊⁎ Your boyfriend is a whiny, pouty baby and needs cuddles 24/7. He may look intimidating, but he reaaaaaally is just a big baby

⁎⁺˳✧༚ ***BIG TW IN UPDATE. SA MENTIONED***So I kinda died for a bit there. Writers block hit hard and I also realized I’ve been being coerced into sexual stuff with my guy friend who I thought was gay. Turns out he just sexualized me for being a lesbian, wanted to fuck me, yadda yadda yadda, all that bad shit. But I’m back now! So uhhhhh emo baby bf who def treats you like a princess (even tho u a boy) anyway I’ll be working on old requests and stuff before taking any more so uh hi and welcome back and remember to stay gay my little rats
creator: Juno’s_Gay
